name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is a global money transfer service with 16+ locations across Raleigh, NC, operating through partner retailers like Walmart, CVS, and independent check cashers.
description_long: MoneyGram is an established money transfer company that operates through a network of retail and financial service partners rather than standalone branches. The company facilitates domestic and international money transfers, leveraging partnerships with major retailers (Walmart, CVS), specialty check-cashing businesses (Ask Check Cashing, Dalia Check Cashing), and international markets to provide accessible financial services across Raleigh, North Carolina. MoneyGram's primary service offering centers on sending and receiving money transfers both online and offline. Customers can manage transfers through their website or by visiting one of 16+ physical locations in the Raleigh area, with partner locations open during extended hours (some until 11:59 PM). The company distinguishes itself through widespread accessibility via recognizable retail partners and flexible service channels rather than proprietary storefronts. Most MoneyGram locations are embedded within existing retailers, making the service convenient for customers already shopping at Walmart, CVS, or specialty financial service providers. However, the business model relies entirely on partner locations, meaning service quality and availability depend on individual retailers' operations and policies. MoneyGram is best suited for customers seeking convenient money transfer options at familiar retail locations rather than those needing comprehensive financial services.
pros: 16+ active locations across Raleigh with extended operating hours (some open until 11:59 PM)
Available at major national retailers (Walmart, CVS) with multiple locations for convenience
Both online and offline transfer options for flexibility
Partner locations include specialized check-cashing businesses with relevant expertise
No requirement to open a bank account to send or receive money
Geographic distribution across Raleigh with distances ranging 2-4.6 miles from downtown
cons: Dependent entirely on partner retailer availability and hours—service not directly controlled by MoneyGram
No standalone MoneyGram locations; all services accessed through third-party retailers
Website does not display specific fee structures or transfer rates
Limited information on international transfer capabilities or exchange rates
Partner locations vary widely in specialization (some are general retailers, not financial specialists)
best_for: Customers who want to send or receive money at familiar retail locations like Walmart or CVS
Unbanked or underbanked individuals seeking money transfer without a traditional bank account
People seeking convenient extended-hours money services in Raleigh
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers seeking accessible money transfer services through familiar retail locations rather than dedicated financial institutions. The primary caveat is that service availability and quality depend entirely on partner retailer operations, and the company does not provide comprehensive financial services beyond transfers.
services: In-person money transfer at retail partner locations
Check cashing (through partner locations like Ask Check Cashing and Dalia Check Cashing)
Money orders (implied through check-cashing partner network)
Location finder and transfer tracking tools
